description: Geṭ (bill of divorce). Written and signed by Mevorakh b. Natan he-Ḥaver; also signed by Shemarya b. Avraham. Location: Fustat. Dated: Sunday, 9 Shevaṭ 1475 Seleucid = 5 January 1164 CE. Husband: Manṣūr b. Abū Saʿd al-Ṣayrafī known as Ibn ʿUmmayr. Wife: Nasab bt. Faraḥ. Verso: attestation that the get was delivered the same day. (Information from Goitein's note card.) See also BL OR 5524.6 (PGPID 6189). This shelfmark is chronologically significant given that Mevorakh's patronymic nomenclature lists his father Natan as deceased (ז׳׳ל), which marks one of (if not the first) dated document where this is the case (Information from Oded Zinger).
description_he: מסמך משפטי בארמית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בהספרייה הבריטית.
